notes:
SOURCE (re-fetched, all confirmed): Primary per-pack rates from Elite Fourum compiled SM-era study (author "burpies", n=7020 packs aggregated from booster-opening videos, 95% CI). Re-fetch returned the EXACT cited figures for SM Base (sm1): Holo GX 11.15% (+/-0.74), Full Art Pokemon 2.82% (+/-0.39), Full Art Trainer 1.40% (+/-0.27), Rainbow Rare 1.47% (+/-0.28), Secret/Gold 0.81% (+/-0.21), total premium hit 17.65% (+/-0.89) ~ 1 in 5.67 packs. Cross-checked against Flipside Gaming SM-era review, which independently corroborates GX ~1:9 packs (=11.1%) and secrets ~1:2 boxes (~1:72 packs ~ 1.4%/pack, consistent with rainbow+gold=2.28%).

MAPPING onto engine COARSE buckets (rare-or-better is a single mutually-exclusive hit slot):
- ultra-rare = P(Holo GX)+P(FA Pokemon)+P(FA Trainer) = 0.1115+0.0282+0.0140 = 0.1537 (GX, full-art Pokemon, full-art Trainer all collapse to ultra-rare per the engine's lumping rule).
- secret-rare = P(Rainbow)+P(Secret/Gold) = 0.0147+0.0081 = 0.0228 (rainbow + gold collapse to secret-rare).
- rare = 1 - 0.1537 - 0.0228 = 0.8235 (holo + non-holo rares, default slot fill). Slot sums to 1.0 exactly.
Per-box sanity (verified): 0.1537*36 = 5.53 ultra-rares/box, 0.0228*36 = 0.82 secret-rares/box; matches community "4-5 UR + 1 guaranteed full art, secret roughly every other box" reports. Hit economy is sane (not a GX every pack).

FILLER SLOTS: 4 common (common=1.0), 3 uncommon (uncommon=1.0), 1 reverse-holo modeled 50/50 common/uncommon filler (sums to 1.0); 10th card = basic Energy, not modeled.

PRODUCTS: SM1 is a STANDARD set. 36-pack booster box with 10 cards/pack independently confirmed via fetchable retailer (collectorscache) and the Best Buy "36 Packs" listing exists -> displayPacks=36. ETB = 8 packs confirmed via re-fetched Bulbapedia SM merchandise page ("included eight Sun & Moon booster packs") -> etbPacks=8.

BUCKET CHECK: all keys {common, uncommon, rare, ultra-rare, secret-rare} are within this set's available buckets; no out-of-set bucket (no shiny-rare; that is Hidden Fates only).

CONFIDENCE: medium (honest cap) - n=7020 is a sizeable community aggregation of opening videos, NOT an official/peer-published study, and video samples can over-represent hits; corroborated by an independent era-rate source.
